MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Settlement Conference. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. Plaintiff was represented bvy Arnold W. Evje, Esq. amd Defendant Timothy S. Cole appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties not placed on record. Trial date is vacated.
